description_long: This is a compact, modern single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist exterior. The facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass doors framed in black, providing ample natural light and a contemporary look. The side walls are clad in vertical beige paneling, punctuated by tall, narrow windows with white blinds, enhancing the verticality of the design. The rear section includes a small protruding volume with a horizontal window, likely serving as a utility or bathroom area. Inside, the house is divided into distinct rooms, with visible interior furnishings such as a bed, lamp, and shelving. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a neutral color palette.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass doors, and vertical beige paneling. Features tall, narrow windows and a minimalist, functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass sliding doors framed in black, revealing the interior living space and furnishings.
description_view_1: Side view with three tall, narrow windows with white blinds, and beige vertical paneling dominating the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a protruding section with a horizontal window and a glimpse of the glass doors on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view with a single tall, narrow window and a partial view of the interior, including a lamp and window.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with tall vertical strips and large glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large glass sliding doors with black frames, no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a sleek, minimalist entrance.
